series_metadata.series_title: Managed Care Organization (MCO) Administrative Payment Calculations
series_metadata.series_description: The Managed Care Organization (MCO) Administrative Payment Calculations are excel spreadsheets used by the Managed Care Organization (MCO) Business Unit to determine the set-off calculations to the MCO incentive payments. When an MCO fails to meet a performance benchmark a set-off is applied to their payment. The set-off calculation determines the amount deducted from their payment. The methodology for the calculation is part of the MCO Agreement.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the MCO Business unit for 2 years then retain in the Records Center for 15 years. ; Electronic: Retain on the BWC server for 17 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
